placements.overview:
Founded in 2002, KITE - Kautilya Institute of Technology and Engineering is a private institute. It is located in Jaipur, Rajasthan. The institute is accredited with AICTE. KITE - Kautilya Institute of Technology and Engineering provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 14 courses across specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Structural Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. KITE - Kautilya Institute of Technology and Engineering fees ranges between INR 1,16,296 to 2,95,516. The student intake for these courses is 831. KITE - Kautilya Institute of Technology and Engineering offers these course across fields such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. KITE - Kautilya Institute of Technology and Engineering offers all the campus facilities to students.

KITE - Kautilya Institute of Technology and Engineering offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. KITE - Kautilya Institute of Technology and Engineering courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for KITE - Kautilya Institute of Technology and Engineering courses stands around INR 1,16,296 to 2,95,516.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with my college because faculties and campus is best but placement ratio is less.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70% of students were placed in my civil engineering course. The highest average package is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Top companies: Larsen & Turbo, Byju's, Capgemini and many others.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms, laboratories, and infrastructure are good, and the college campus is awesome. The lab is well-equipped, and the library is wonderful, with a peaceful environment and almost 13,000 books.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty there were top-notch and very helpful. The semester exams were difficult, and less than 70% of the students passed. If we are serious about our studies, the teachers are very supportive. However, the college is only good for the civil engineering department. Students in other departments are less crowded.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Overall experience was good, with good faculty members and average placements.

review_content.Placements: The average percentage of students who were placed in their respective fields during my graduation was around 40. At that time due to demonetization most of the companies didn't show up. The highest package offered was around 3 lac per annum and the minimum was around 1 lac per annum. L&W and RK Marbles were the top recruiting companies for my course. Around 50 to 60% of students got internships in government agencies like JDA, PWD, etc. And In private companies like L&T, Unique Builders. Junior Engineer was the top role offered in my course.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is very good college with good teachers.

review_content.Placements: About 50% of students got placed in our college. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 5 LPA. TCS, Whitehatjr are the recruiting companies of college. About 20% of students got placed in TCS and Whitehat jr. Mechanical engineering, civil engineering, computer science engineering, electrical engineering, and M.Tech course are available in the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Buildings, rooms, computer labs, etc., are available on campus. The quality of the benches is good. Classes are neat and clean. There are healthy foods available. The mess was neat and clean and the tables are cleaned from time to time.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with placements, but provides good infrastructure and campus.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students were placed, but not good companies visit to hire students, because there were not good companies to hire students. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA, and the top recruiting company was Construction company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Laboratories for the civil branch were good. The library and classrooms were also good. There were no facilities to stay in the hostel, and the quality of food was average. There were no sports and games but every year one sports week starts on a good level were conducted.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college and faculty. But not satisfied with the attendance criteria.

review_content.Placements: Around 40-50% of the students are placed. The highest salary package offered ranges from 3 LPA - 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA - 2 LPA. IT companies arrive at our campus and there is no civil core company. Almost 40-50% of students got internships from your course in information technology companies. College is overall good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. Teachers are good too. We have good labs and lab equipment is also very useful, neat, and clean. Classroom facility is good and enough tables are available. Canteen food is not good and the price is high but it is fine for college lunch.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It has all helpful teachers, well-updated laboratories and good placement opportunities if you want.

review_content.Placements: From our college, approximately 60% of the students get placed from every passed out batch from the civil branch. If we consider the overall branch placement information, the placement rate increased to 75%, while the other 25% of the students opt for the government sector. Some others opt for the fields as per their interest. The highest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2.1 LPA. Major companies which visit here for placements are related to the civil branch, and they are L&T, Tata, GRIL, etc. In our course, surveying, soil and design roles are offered.

overview_faqs.answer: Shivdan Singh Institute of Technology and Management, located in Aligarh, Uttar Pradesh, is a renowned educational institution and was established in the year 1997. The institute offers a wide range of Degree and Diploma programmes at UG, PG and After 10th levels. reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it was an average college and good for middle class.

review_content.Placements: Placements were not available in our college. It is a government college but the college tries for student placements. It is the best college for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good and a hostel facility was available. Many courses were available for students. Parking and Wi-Fi were also available on campus. It was very easy during admission. Book bank facility, food facilities, and canteen were available.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college were good and gave proper guidance for exams. They were very supportive and very helpful to students. The exams were conducted with proper maintenance.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college but needs more facilities and more practical sessions.

review_content.Placements: About 50% of students are placed. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA, and the highest is up to 10 LPA. The top recruiting companies include AWS, Mahindra Tech, Microsoft, Tata Consultancy Services, Globus Soft, and many more. About 40% of students get internships. The roles offered are coordinator head, NSS head, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities include labs, classrooms with fans, projectors, a Wi-Fi campus, a canteen, a hostel, and good-quality food in the mess. Breakfast is good, they change food items daily in a week, and lunch is pretty good, but the food quality at dinner time is not as good as it is at lunch time.

content.Placements: Placement solely depend on your skill you can somewhat depend on the collage. But it doesn't guarantee placements. And most of the companies want experienced student. So would recommend trying outside the campus too. There is also training for the interview.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Rungta College of Engineering.

content.Placements: A lot of students—about 60%—were placed in the department. The highest was 10 LPA and the lowest was 3 LPA. Infosys, TCS, Cognizant and Wipro were the top recruiters. There is no help provided by the college for internships. It is upon the students potential to secure an internship opportunity .

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it was an average college and good for middle class.

content.Placements: Placements were not available in our college. It is a government college but the college tries for student placements. It is the best college for students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good and a hostel facility was available. Many courses were available for students. Parking and Wi-Fi were also available on campus. It was very easy during admission. Book bank facility, food facilities, and canteen were available.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college were good and gave proper guidance for exams. They were very supportive and very helpful to students. The exams were conducted with proper maintenance.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college but needs more facilities and more practical sessions.

content.Placements: About 50% of students are placed. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA, and the highest is up to 10 LPA. Breakfast is good, they change food items daily in a week, and lunch is pretty good, but the food quality at dinner time is not as good as it is at lunch time.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: There are good placements and good faculty members in 2020.

content.Placements: Placements are good here. An average of about 60%-70% of the students get placed from here. Special placement classes are also organised by our college. Many companies visit our college for placements. Placements and job opportunities are very good and also mentioned on our college's official website.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good here, and it seems attractive. Classrooms and labs are well maintained by the staff members. You can see different types of buildings in our college. For every different course, there is a separate infrastructure. Overall, our college is good.

review_summary.college_name: Kandula Obul Reddy Memorial College Of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good staff to learn and achieve big things in your life.

content.Placements: In my college, 70 to 80% of the students are placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA. The lowest package offered is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Wipro, TCS, and Tech Mahindra. 80% of students got internships, and the top roles are offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Good lab facilities are available, and Wi-Fi is also available. We have good networking speed and digital classrooms are also available with AC classrooms. Hostel facilities are extraordinary with AC rooms and attached bathrooms with good food and snacks in the evening. Extracurricular activities are conducted like sports and games indoor and outdoor like cricket, volleyball, kho-kho, and baseball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college for students with minimum education and curricular activities.

content.Placements: My college has a total of 80 members in the CSE stream. Nearly 70 students got internships. Still, we didn't get any company for recruitment. We are waiting for the placement drive. The CSE department secured 40-50% of placements last year. Top roles in the last year were testing head and project management. Students secured 12 LPA. A few more are taken as freshers.
content.Infrastructure: My college contains two blocks for CSE and ECE. It has two grounds for volleyball and handball courts. There is also a shuttle court. We have two libraries and six labs for both CSE and ECE departments. Both boys' and girls' hostel facilities are available. The food is also nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is better to complete graduation than others because of its good placements and infra.

content.Placements: Top companies have been approached for placements, and over half of the students in our college have a minimum 65 percent academic score, and mostly software companies are student placements. On the core side, no one got placements in our college. The top recruiting companies are IBM, Wipro, and TCS.
content.Infrastructure: While we are studying, there is no Wi-Fi limit of 35 MB of data. Now I think the Wi-Fi facility is there. Labs, or average infrastructure, and libraries have so many good books available. Nice facilities now provide average food quality, the mess in the canteen is so bad, and medical facilities are available. Sports are a good place to practise.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The campus is beautiful and has a good environment.

content.Placements: Around 95% of students are placed in top companies like Capgemini, HCL, etc. The average salary package offered is 6.5 LPA with free accommodation.
content.Infrastructure: It has well-experienced faculty members, and the best laboratories are provided. It also has workshops with a Wi-Fi facility. It provides an air-conditioner and laboratories. It also has a good parking space. Wi-Fi is enabled on the campus. The hostel is clean with good furniture 24X7 water, a good dining room, and 24X7 electricity. It has a big playground and transportation facilities for far village students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with our college.

content.Placements: My name is Anu. In our college, from our department, out of 135 students, about 109 students were placed. The highest salary package offered in our department is 7 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies here are L&T, Megha Constructions, etc. About 78% of students got internships from here. Project engineer and head of department roles are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, for every department, well and good infrastructure is provided. Facilities for students are good. For every department, they provide Wi-Fi in every classroom. There is the best library with a lot of volumes and the latest version of books. The quality of food served is very hygienic and tasty. The hostel premises are very clean. A doctor is available for quick medical facilities. We have sports preference in our college.

Kandula Obul Reddy Memorial College Of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.

Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Sri Sai College of IT And Management has a review rating of 3.4 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.3 on campuslife, 2.5 on placements, 4 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Sai College of IT And Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a good place to gain knowledge.

content.Placements: The campus placements are good. Many companies visit our college to give jobs to the point of the project we did. The average salary package offered is 2 LPA. Many students apply for off-campus placements in their last year. Students get placed off-campus with a salary package of 4 LPA if they have skills.
content.Infrastructure: The campus life is very good. The campus is very green and full of trees. The college has a huge ground. The hostel is clean, and they will provide you with a bed and a desk. It has an aqua guard to get pure water.
content.Faculty: The course curriculum is fantastic. Faculty members in our college have a lot of teaching experience. Some teachers are PhD holders, and they help students a lot. Semester exams are pretty easy.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Sai College of IT And Management.

content.Placements: I am a student of MCA of 2014 batch, and our passed out year is 2017. There are no campus placements in our college. Sometimes companies visit here depending on the management. If the management knows any known companies, it will invite them for campus interviews. During our tenure at our college, placements were conducted for our seniors, and they got placed in companies like TCS, etc., with good salary packages. Our batch didn't have any campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good here, and our college doesn't provide hostel facility. But this college doesn't provide Wi-Fi facility for students, and the classrooms have a good environment with lightings and air. Labs are good, and the library provides all kinds of books and internet access.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am very disappointed with this college.

content.Placements: The college provided placement opportunities, but the jobs profile were not belonging to MBA students. The placements provided by the college are eligible for intermediate and SSC completed students, and these jobs are provided by local political people under Jobmela.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were good and had a good environment in the college premises. We also lab and library with good facilities. The college provided Wi-Fi of 20 MB per day and it was not enough even for 20 mints of browsing the internet.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in every year.

content.Placements: 90% of students are there in that course and get best results and good technology getting from lecturers and they conduct some seminars and cultural activities and some other technical courses also and most of the students became a good professional.
content.Infrastructure: In this college classrooms, labs and library also available. Wi-Fi also is there and the canteen is also very nice and they provide healthy and fresh food etc. Here sports, interviews, placements also conducted. So many excellent facilities is there.

review_content.General: Our college has a hostel facility where free drinking water, bed, a table, and a chair are also provided to students. Mess facility is also provided to students, where fresh and hygienic food is provided. Our college has a well-stocked library with various varieties of books and journals available. Big sports and games grounds are also for students. Yoga and martial arts classes are also provided to students. Our classrooms are well cleaned and managed properly. The canteen is also available, where our morning starts with tea and coffee. Laboratories and medical facilities are available.

Since my college started in 2018 and we were first batch, placement wasn't offered. But there are certifications like US CMA, US PCM, etc. that can increase the chances of getting into good off campus jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is pretty amazing. All the classrooms, library and labs are well-equipped and organized. College also provides hostel and mess facilities at reasonable price. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is the best. There are medical and sports facilities as well. Moreover, sports and tournaments are held very frequently.

Top recruiting companies are Samsung, Amazon, Maruti Suzuki, Reliance, HDFC Bank, Accenture, and Syntel. 70 percent of students got internships.

Our college has a library where many collections of books, magazines, newspapers are available. Our college has medical and first aid kit facilities. Sports facilities are also available in our college. Hostel and mess are provided to students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied by all the facilities offered by my college. It is worth studying in DCBM.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is pretty amazing. All the classrooms, library and labs are well-equipped and organized. College also provides hostel and mess facilities at reasonable price. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is the best. There are medical and sports facilities as well. Moreover, sports and tournaments are held very frequently.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college with good placement opportunities and internships are also provided.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-furnished classrooms with proper electricity supplies and furniture. There are laboratories with proper machines and equipment. Our college has a library where many collections of books, magazines, newspapers are available. Our college has medical and first aid kit facilities. Sports facilities are also available in our college. Hostel and mess are provided to students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best infrastructure facilities with the best smart classrooms.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are well-maintained with smart boards. Wi-Fi facilities are also provided to students and staff. The football ground is also available for students. A swimming pool is also available. Laboratories are furnished properly. The library is also available where we can borrow books while issuing a library card. Medical facilities are also available.

highlights.summary: Symbiosis Centre for Corporate Education, Symbiosis International, Pune is an institute located in Pune, Maharashtra. Symbiosis Centre for Corporate Education, Symbiosis International, Pune courses are offered to students at the PG and Certificate levels. The institute offers courses in both Full Time and Part Time modes. Symbiosis Centre for Corporate Education, Symbiosis International, Pune offers a total of 23 courses in stream such as Business & Management Studies. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are MBA/PGDM, Executive MBA/PGDM, Certificate and MDP. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Finance, Human Resources, Operations and Transport & Logistics. Further, the fee for all these courses is INR 8,000 and the average median salary is around INR 9,00,000. Apart from this, the Symbiosis Centre for Corporate Education, Symbiosis International, Pune campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.
